title: Game Guide Content Schema
game_uuid: should match the game_uuid in the game.schema.json
description: Human-readable content for the Game Guide, optimized for Competitors, Judges, and Preparers.

legend.description: The thematic 'hook' or story to set the stage.

quest.description: The one-sentence goal for the scouts (e.g., 'Boil the water over').

briefing.description: Specific performance instructions for the competitors.

rules.description: A list of constraints and 'By Royal Decree' rules.

scoring_overview.description: General text describing metrics (e.g., 'Fastest time to boil wins'). No strict structure.

judging_notes.description: Tips, quality cues, and 'soft' advice for the judge in the field.

staffing.description: Number and type of staff needed.

reset.description: Optional: How to restore the game to its zero-state.

supplies.description: Structured list for the Game Preparer.
